name: ListProjects returns a list and validates against schema
description: Smoke check + schema validation for the canonical list endpoint. Required fields are enforced per spec; new BC5-only fields surface as extras-observed.

name: GetProject decodes the spec-required fields
description: First-project fallback is acceptable; verifies Project @required fields are structurally present.

name: GetMyAssignments decodes priorities + non_priorities
description: Verifies MyAssignment.bucket JSON-key compat — the field is preserved despite route renames.

name: GetMyNotifications decodes unreads/reads/memories/bubble_ups
description: Verifies BC5 additions (bubble_ups, scheduled_bubble_ups) decode as arrays, and exercises the top-level memories[] regression: BC5 master ships memories as [] while BC4 four still populates it. The pairwiseSupersetArray rule below encodes the intended additive-only invariant but is currently waived (pairwiseDeltaAllowed) because the BC3 fix (#10947, json.memories @bubble_ups) is written but unmerged — see spec/api-gaps/memories-emptied-regression.md.

pairwiseAssertions.reason: Additive-only invariant: BC5 memories[] should remain a superset of BC4's. Currently WAIVED by the pairwiseDeltaAllowed entry below — see spec/api-gaps/memories-emptied-regression.md for the confirmed live regression.

Top-level GetMyNotifications keys must not regress between BC4 and BC5 — additive-only invariant. New BC5 keys (bubble_ups, scheduled_bubble_ups) are expected; key removals fail. memories remains present as a key on BC5 (only its contents are emptied), so this rule is unaffected by the memories regression.

TEMPORARY waiver for a confirmed live regression: BC5 master ships `json.memories []` while BC4 four still populates it. The fix is written but unmerged — BC3 #10947 carries `json.memories @bubble_ups` (head 9dc63e2e). Remove this waiver (restoring the pairwiseSupersetArray hard-fail) once #10947 merges and provenance is repinned. Tracked in spec/api-gaps/memories-emptied-regression.md.

name: GetMyProfile decodes the self-Person payload
description: Self profile via people.me(). Exercises Person required fields and BC5 tagline alias.

name: GetTodoset decodes the BC5 count + url additions
description: Verifies todos_count, completed_loose_todos_count, todos_url, app_todos_url decode (when present — eligibility-gated like other BC5 additions).

name: ListTodolists returns a list under a todoset
ListTodos exercises Todo.steps additive field
description: When BC5 emits Todo.steps, the additive field decodes through the existing CardStep shape.
